changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE gdpr_system_article_status_log ADD COLUMN created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT now();
CREATE INDEX i_gdpr_system_article_status_log_for_create_date ON gdpr_system_article_status_log (organization_id, created_at);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE gdpr_system_article_status_log DROP COLUMN created_at;
